query:
INSERT INTO sde_solar_system_metadata (id, sde_version, sde_checksum, loaded_at)
        VALUES (1, $1, $2, now())
        ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE
            SET sde_version  = EXCLUDED.sde_version,
                sde_checksum = EXCLUDED.sde_checksum,
                loaded_at    = EXCLUDED.loaded_at
